events.title: EC archives of the week

items.title: EC archives of the week (05-11/07): Meeting between Muhammad Yunus, 2006 Nobel Peace Prize ® laureate, and José Manuel Barroso, President of the EC (06/07/2011, 15 years ago) Debate and vote on the draft revision of the Treaties of the EC, plenary session of the EP (07-08/07/1981, 45 years ago) EU-US leaders meeting and NATO Summit in Warsaw (08-09/07/2016, 10 years ago) Ministers for Finance gave Slovenia the final go-ahead to become the 13th Member of the Eurozone on 1 January 2007 (11/07/2006, 20 years ago) International Day of Reflection and Commemoration of the 1995 Genocide in Srebrenica (11/07)
